data.en: Dan and Kate are married.
data.hint: married 是形容词作表语，说明现在的状态。

data.en: They got married exactly 20 years ago.
data.cn: 他们正是二十年前结婚的。
data.hint: got married 表示结婚这个动作发生在过去，且与 ago（过去时间词）连用。

data.en: Today is their 20th wedding anniversary.
data.cn: 今天是他们结婚20周年纪念日。
data.hint: wedding anniversary 表示结婚纪念日，wedding 是名词修饰 anniversary。

data.en: They have been married for 20 years.
data.cn: 他们结婚已经二十年了。
data.hint: for + 时间段，配合现在完成时表示持续状态。

data.en: How long have they been married?
data.hint: How long 引导的特殊疑问句中，have 提前作助动词。

data.en: Paul is in hospital.
data.hint: in hospital 表示生病住院，不加冠词 the。

data.en: He's been in hospital since Monday.
data.cn: 他自周一以来一直在住院。
data.hint: since + 具体时间点，配合现在完成时表示持续状态。
accept: He has been in hospital since Monday.

data.en: We know each other very well.
data.hint: know each other 表示互相认识，表示现在的常规状态。

data.en: We've known each other for a long time.
data.hint: know 是状态动词，常用现在完成简单时表达持续状态。
accept: We have known each other for a long time.

data.en: Do they have a car?
data.hint: have 在此句中是普通动词，表示拥有，疑问句需要借助 do。

data.en: How long have they had their car?
data.hint: have（拥有）的过去分词是 had，不用进行时。

data.en: She's waiting for somebody.
data.hint: wait for sb. 表示等待某人，现在进行时。
accept: She is waiting for somebody.

data.en: She hasn't been waiting very long.
data.hint: 现在完成进行时的否定形式：hasn't been doing。
accept: She has not been waiting very long.

data.en: How long have you been driving?
data.hint: How long 引导现在完成进行时提问持续动作的时长。

data.en: How long have you lived here?
data.hint: live 可以用现在完成简单时提问“住多久”。

data.en: How long have you been working here?
data.hint: work 可以使用现在完成进行时表达工作了多久。

data.en: How long have you known Jane?
data.hint: know 是非持续性/状态动词，提问时长必须用简单时形式。

data.en: How long has Paul been in hospital?
data.hint: Paul 是单三主语，助动词用 has。

data.en: How long have you known Katherine?
data.hint: 提问认识多久，使用 know 的完成式 known，搭配 have you。

data.en: How long has your sister been in Australia?
data.cn: 你姐姐去澳大利亚多久了？
data.hint: your sister 是单三主语，助动词用 has，Australia 首字母大写。

data.en: I've had these shoes for ages.
data.hint: have 表示“拥有”是状态，用 have had 而不能用 been having。
accept: I have had these shoes for ages.

data.en: I've always lived in the country.
data.hint: always（一直）与 live 连用时，要用现在完成简单时形式。
accept: I have always lived in the country.

data.en: I haven't seen Tom since Monday.
data.cn: 自周一以来我没见过汤姆。
data.hint: I haven't seen... since... 表示自某个时间点起没做某事。
accept: I have not seen Tom since Monday.

data.en: Sarah hasn't phoned for ages.
data.hint: for ages 表示很久了，用完成时否定形式。
accept: Sarah has not phoned for ages.

data.en: Ben is a friend of mine.
data.hint: a friend of mine 双重所有格结构。

data.en: I know him very well.
data.hint: know 是动词原形，very well 修饰 know。

data.en: Lisa is in Germany.
data.hint: in Germany 表示在德国这个国家。

data.en: She's been there on a business trip.
data.hint: on a business trip 固定搭配，表示出差。
accept: She has been there on a business trip.

data.en: I've always wanted to go to New York.
data.hint: always 置于助动词 have 之后，过去分词 wanted 之前。
accept: I have always wanted to go to New York.

data.en: We've known each other a long time.
data.hint: known each other a long time，省略了 for。
accept: We have known each other a long time.

data.en: I've been learning English since January.
data.cn: 自一月以来我一直在学英语。
data.hint: learn 是可持续动作，强调这期间一直在学习，用完成进行时。
accept: I have been learning English since January.

data.en: It's been raining all morning.
data.hint: all morning 搭配完成进行时强调下雨的持续状态。
accept: It has been raining all morning.

data.en: Richard has been doing the same job for 20 years.
data.cn: 理查德做同一份工作已经二十年了。
data.hint: doing the same job 做同一份工作，持续20年。

data.en: Julia has been living in this house for a long time.
data.cn: 朱莉娅在这栋房子里住了很长时间。（进行时）
data.hint: Julia 是单三主语，用 has been living 表示持续居住。
accept: Julia has lived in this house for a long time.

data.en: Julia has lived in this house for a long time.
data.cn: 朱莉娅在这栋房子里住了很长时间。（简单时）
data.hint: live 和 work 也可以使用完成简单时表达相同的持续性。
accept: Julia has been living in this house for a long time.

data.en: How long have you worked here?
data.cn: 你在这里工作多久了？（简单时）
data.hint: work 在问及 How long 时，完成进行时和简单时通用。
accept: How long have you been working here?

data.en: How long have you been working here?
data.cn: 你在这里工作多久了？（进行时）
data.hint: 使用完成进行时更能强调长期的工作持续状态。
accept: How long have you worked here?

data.en: It's raining now.
data.hint: now 搭配现在进行时 is/are raining 强调当下这一刻的动作。
accept: It is raining now.

data.en: The weather has been awful since I arrived.
data.cn: 自我到达以来天气一直很糟糕。
data.hint: since 引导过去状态/动作，主句用现在完成时（has been）。

data.en: Have you been waiting long?
data.hint: 用现在完成进行时提问最近一段时间以来的等待状态。

data.en: I met Maria only recently.
data.hint: met 是 meet 的过去式，recently 意思是最近。

data.en: I haven't known her very long.
data.hint: know 是状态动词，否定句使用 haven't known 表示认识时间不长。
accept: I have not known her very long.

data.en: I'm not feeling good.
data.hint: feel good/well 感觉好，正在进行时表达目前感受。
accept: I am not feeling good.

data.en: I've been feeling ill all day.
data.hint: all day 表示整天，搭配现在完成进行时，表示生病状态的持续。
accept: I have been feeling ill all day.

data.en: I haven't seen her for three months.
data.cn: 我有三个月没见到她了。
data.hint: for + 时间段，否定句表达“多久没做某事”。
accept: I have not seen her for three months.

data.en: I haven't played tennis for years.
data.hint: for years 意思是好几年了，表示长时间没打网球。
accept: I have not played tennis for years.

data.en: He hasn't been ill since I've known him.
data.cn: 自从我认识他以来他就没生过病。
data.hint: since 从句中也可以使用现在完成时 (I've known him)。
accept: He has not been ill since I have known him.
He hasn't been ill since I have known him.
He has not been ill since I've known him.

data.en: He's been in Milan for many years.
data.hint: he's been = he has been，for many years 修饰在米兰的时间。
accept: He has been in Milan for many years.

data.en: He's been watching TV all evening.
data.cn: 他整个晚上都在看电视。
data.hint: all evening 表示整个晚上，动作处于持续状态。
accept: He has been watching TV all evening.

data.en: I haven't watched TV since last weekend.
data.cn: 自上周末以来我一直没看电视。
data.hint: since last weekend 自从上周末，引导特定时间点。
accept: I have not watched TV since last weekend.
